payload.summary: Dogfood gap (speed-count-game, 2026-07-23): codex session could not discover nahel at all. Causes: (1) install only supports --agent claude (codex shims = roadmap Phase 5); (2) init keeps a pre-existing AGENTS.md untouched, so the nahel orientation section never lands in the file conversational agents actually read; (3) no PATH binary yet (bun-path invocation is unguessable). Mitigations applied: ~/.local/bin/nahel wrapper (machine-local), nahel section appended to the repo AGENTS.md. Backlog: init-should-offer-agents-md-merge (append/merge template section into an existing AGENTS.md instead of skipping silently).
